subject: SCIENCE
title: Basic needs of living response and reproduction
objective: Basic needs of living response and reproduction — observe the outer parts of plants, such as leaves, roots, and stems and identify their role
introduction: Welcome to your science lab! 🧪 Today's discovery: Basic needs of living response and reproduction 5. observe the outer parts of pl. All you need is your eyes, your brain, and your curiosity. Let's explore together!

vocabulary.definition: Panonood nang mabuti gamit ang iyong mga pandama.
May buhay — lumalaki, gumagalaw, nangangailangan ng pagkain.
